      intro b ⟨z, hz⟩; rw [← hz]; exact h₂ z
    constructor
    · apply csSup_le ⟨x₀, rfl⟩
      intro b ⟨z, hz⟩; rw [← hz]; exact h₂ z
    intro x
    constructor
    · apply le_csSup ⟨1, ?_⟩ ⟨x, rfl⟩
      intro b ⟨z, hz⟩; rw [← hz]; exact h₂ z
    intro ε hε
    have := Real.lt_sSup_iff ⟨1, by intro b ⟨z, hz⟩; rw [← hz]; exact h₂ z⟩ ⟨x₀, rfl⟩
    rw [this]
    intro ⟨z, ⟨w, hw⟩, hz⟩
    exact ⟨w, by linarith [hw ▸ hz]⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hMpos, hMle1, hMsup⟩ := hM
  have key : ∀ x, |f (x + y) + f (x - y)| ≤ 2 * M := fun x => by
    calc |f (x + y) + f (x - y)| ≤ |f (x + y)| + |f (x - y)| := abs_add _ _
      _ ≤ M + M := add_le_add (hMsup _).1 (hMsup _).1
      _ = 2 * M := by ring
  have key2 : ∀ x, |f (x + y) + f (x - y)| = |2 * f x * g y| := fun x => by rw [h₀]
  have key3 : ∀ x, |2 * f x * g y| = 2 * |f x| * |g y| := fun x => by
    rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (2:ℝ) > 0)]
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := (hMsup 0).2 (M * (|g y| - 1) / |g y|) (by positivity)
  have h4 : 2 * |f x| * |g y| ≤ 2 * M := by rw [← key3, ← key2]; exact key x
  have h5 : M - M * (|g y| - 1) / |g y| < |f x| := hx
  have hgy_pos : 0 < |g y| := by linarith
  nlinarith

push_neg at h₁
  obtain ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩ := h₁
  intro y
  have key := h₀ x₀ y
  have habs : |f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y)| = |2 * f x₀ * g y| := by rw [key]
  have h1 : |f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y)| ≤ |f (x₀ + y)| + |f (x₀ - y)| := abs_add _ _
  have h2 : |f (x₀ + y)| + |f (x₀ - y)| ≤ 2 := by linarith [h₂ (x₀ + y), h₂ (x₀ - y)]
  have h3 : |2 * f x₀ * g y| = 2 * |f x₀| * |g y| := by
    rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (2 : ℝ) > 0)]
  rw [h3] at habs
  have h4 : 2 * |f x₀| * |g y| ≤ 2 := by linarith
  have hfx₀_pos : 0 < |f x₀| := abs_pos.mpr hx₀
  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have : 2 * |f x₀| * |g y| > 2 * |f x₀| * 1 := by nlinarith
  have : 2 * |f x₀| * 1 ≥ 2 * |f x₀| := le_refl _
  have hle : |f x₀| ≤ 1 := h₂ x₀
  nlinarith

push_neg at h₁
  obtain ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩ := h₁
  have key : ∀ y, 2 * f x₀ * g y = f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y) := fun y => h₀ x₀ y
  intro y
  have h3 : |2 * f x₀ * g y| = |f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y)| := by rw [key]
  have h4 : |f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y)| ≤ |f (x₀ + y)| + |f (x₀ - y)| := abs_add _ _
  have h5 : |f (x₀ + y)| + |f (x₀ - y)| ≤ 2 := by linarith [h₂ (x₀ + y), h₂ (x₀ - y)]
  have h6 : |2 * f x₀ * g y| ≤ 2 := by linarith
  rw [abs_mul, abs_mul] at h6
  have hfx₀_pos : 0 < |f x₀| := abs_pos.mpr hx₀
  have h7 : 2 * |f x₀| * |g y| ≤ 2 := by linarith [abs_nonneg (f x₀), abs_nonneg (g y)]
  have h8 : |f x₀| * |g y| ≤ 1 := by linarith
  have h9 : |f x₀| ≤ 1 := h₂ x₀
  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have : |f x₀| * |g y| > |f x₀| * 1 := by nlinarith
  linarith

push_neg at h₁
  obtain ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩ := h₁
  intro y
  have key := h₀ x₀ y
  have hf₀ : |f x₀| > 0 := abs_pos.mpr hx₀
  have h2f₀ : 2 * |f x₀| > 0 := by linarith
  have : g y = (f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y)) / (2 * f x₀) := by
    field_simp
    linarith [key]
  rw [this]
  rw [abs_div, abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (2 : ℝ) > 0)]
  apply div_le_one_of_le
  · calc |f (x₀ + y) + f (x₀ - y)| ≤ |f (x₀ + y)| + |f (x₀ - y)| := abs_add _ _
      _ ≤ 1 + 1 := by linarith [h₂ (x₀ + y), h₂ (x₀ - y)]
      _ = 2 * 1 := by ring
      _ ≤ 2 * |f x₀| := by nlinarith [h₂ x₀, hf₀]
  · linarith

push_neg at h₁
  obtain ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩ := h₁
  intro y
  by_contra h
  push_neg at h
  have hgy : |g y| > 1 := h
  have key : ∀ x, |f (x + y)| + |f (x - y)| ≥ 2 * |f x| * |g y| := fun x => by
    have := h₀ x y
    calc |f (x + y)| + |f (x - y)| ≥ |f (x + y) + f (x - y)| := abs_add_abs_le_abs_add _ _
      _ = |2 * f x * g y| := by rw [this]
      _ = 2 * |f x| * |g y| := by rw [abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (2:ℝ) > 0)]
  have bound : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ 1 / |g y| := fun x => by
    have h1 := key x
    have h2 := h₂ (x + y)
    have h3 := h₂ (x - y)
    have h4 : |f (x + y)| + |f (x - y)| ≤ 2 := by linarith
    have h5 : 2 * |f x| * |g y| ≤ 2 := by linarith
    have hgpos : |g y| > 0 := by linarith
    calc |f x| = (2 * |f x| * |g y|) / (2 * |g y|) := by field_simp
      _ ≤ 2 / (2 * |g y|) := by apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right h5; linarith
      _ = 1 / |g y| := by ring
  have hx₀' : |f x₀| > 0 := abs_pos.mpr hx₀
  have := bound x₀
  have hgy' : 1 / |g y| < 1 := by
    rw [div_lt_one (by linarith : |g y| > 0)]
    exact hgy
  have : |f x₀| < 1 := lt_of_le_of_lt this hgy'
  -- Now we iterate to get contradiction
  have iter : ∀ n : ℕ, |f x₀| ≤ (1 / |g y|) ^ n := fun n => by
    induction n with
    | zero => simp; exact h₂ x₀
    | succ n ih =>
      have h1 := key x₀
      have := h₂ (x₀ + y)
      have := h₂ (x₀ - y)
      calc |f x₀| ≤ 1 / |g y| := bound x₀
        _ = (1 / |g y|) ^ 1 := by ring
        _ ≤ (1 / |g y|) ^ (n + 1) := by
          apply pow_le_pow_right_of_le_one
          · positivity
          · rw [div_le_one (by linarith)]; linarith
          · omega
  have lim : Filter.Tendsto (fun n => (1 / |g y|) ^ n) Filter.atTop (nhds 0) := by
    apply tendsto_pow_atTop_nhds_zero_of_lt_one <;> positivity <;> rw [div_lt_one] <;> linarith
  have : |f x₀| ≤ 0 := le_of_forall_le_of_dense fun ε hε => by
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := (Filter.tendsto_atTop_nhds).mp lim (Set.Ioo (-ε) ε) (by constructor <;> linarith) (isOpen_Ioo)
    have := iter N
    have hN' := hN N (le_refl N)
    simp only [Set.mem_Ioo] at hN'
    linarith
  linarith [abs_nonneg (f x₀), hx₀']

push_neg at h₁
  obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := h₁
  have hfa_pos : 0 < |f a| := abs_pos.mpr ha
  intro y
  have key := h₀ a y
  have h1 : |f (a + y) + f (a - y)| = |2 * f a * g y| := by rw [key]
  have h2 : |f (a + y) + f (a - y)| ≤ |f (a + y)| + |f (a - y)| := abs_add _ _
  have h3 : |f (a + y)| + |f (a - y)| ≤ 2 := by linarith [h₂ (a + y), h₂ (a - y)]
  have h4 : |2 * f a * g y| ≤ 2 := by linarith
  rw [abs_mul, abs_mul] at h4
  simp only [abs_of_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 2)] at h4
  have h5 : 2 * |f a| * |g y| ≤ 2 := h4
  have h6 : |f a| * |g y| ≤ 1 := by linarith
  by_contra hg
  push_neg at hg
  have : |f a| * |g y| > |f a| * 1 := by
    apply mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hg hfa_pos
  simp at this
  have hfa_le : |f a| ≤ 1 := h₂ a
  linarith

-- First, show g(0) = 1 by setting y = 0
  have hg0 : g 0 = 1 := by
    push_neg at h₁
    obtain ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩ := h₁
    have := h₀ x₀ 0
    simp at this
    field_simp at this
    linarith
  -- Key: for any x₀ with f(x₀) ≠ 0, g(y) = (f(x₀+y) + f(x₀-y)) / (2 f(x₀))
  -- So |g(y)| ≤ (|f(x₀+y)| + |f(x₀-y)|) / (2|f(x₀)|) ≤ 2/(2|f(x₀)|) = 1/|f(x₀)|
  -- We need |f(x₀)| = sup to get |g(y)| ≤ 1
  -- Alternative: suppose |g(y₀)| > 1, derive contradiction
  by_contra hcon
  push_neg at hcon
  obtain ⟨y₀, hy₀⟩ := hcon
  push_neg at h₁
  obtain ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩ := h₁
  -- From h₀: f(x + y₀) + f(x - y₀) = 2 f(x) g(y₀)
  -- Taking supremum: if M = sup |f|, then 2M ≥ |f(x+y₀) + f(x-y₀)| = 2|f(x)||g(y₀)|
  -- So M ≥ |f(x)||g(y₀)| for all x, meaning |f(x)| ≤ M/|g(y₀)| < M for all x
  -- This contradicts M being the supremum (unless M = 0, but f ≢ 0)
  have key : ∀ x, |f x| * |g y₀| ≤ 1 := by
    intro x
    have eq := h₀ x y₀
    have h1 : |f (x + y₀) + f (x - y₀)| ≤ |f (x + y₀)| + |f (x - y₀)| := abs_add _ _
    have h2 : |f (x + y₀)| + |f (x - y₀)| ≤ 2 := by linarith [h₂ (x + y₀), h₂ (x - y₀)]
    have h3 : |f (x + y₀) + f (x - y₀)| ≤ 2 := le_trans h1 h2
    rw [eq] at h3
    simp only [abs_mul, abs_ofNat] at h3
    have h4 : 2 * (|f x| * |g y₀|) ≤ 2 := h3
    linarith
  have : |f x₀| * |g y₀| ≤ 1 := key x₀
  have hfx₀_pos : 0 < |f x₀| := abs_pos.mpr hx₀
  have : |g y₀| ≤ 1 / |f x₀| := by
    rw [div_eq_inv_mul, ← le_div_iff' hfx₀_pos]
    exact this
  have : 1 / |f x₀| ≤ 1 := by
    rw [div_le_one hfx₀_pos]
    exact h₂ x₀
  linarith
